channel.title: Iam on The Hidden Port
channel.description: Recent content in Iam on The Hidden Port

item.title: 5 Critical AWS Security Misconfigurations (2026 Edition) – How to Find & Fix Them
item.description: A practical guide to the five most common AWS security misconfigurations in 2026 and how to fix them using the AWS Console and Terraform.

item.title: AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore Explained: What This IAM Policy Does and When to Use It
item.description: A breakdown of the AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore IAM policy — what permissions it grants, why your EC2 instances need it for Session Manager, and how to scope it down for production.

item.title: AWS Security Checklist 2026: Best Practices Guide
item.description: Free AWS Security Checklist (2026). Covers IAM, EC2, S3, monitoring & compliance. Practical steps to secure your AWS cloud.

item.title: IAM Users Are Dead: Modern AWS Access Control for 2026
item.description: Why AWS IAM users are obsolete in 2026 - and how to implement secure, scalable alternatives with Identity Center, OIDC, and temporary credentials.

item.title: Detecting Privilege Escalation in AWS Using CloudTrail and EventBridge
item.description: Learn how to detect IAM privilege escalation attempts in AWS using CloudTrail logs, EventBridge rules, and practical detection engineering strategies. Includes examples, alerting techniques, and real-world API call patterns.

item.title: Enforcing Least Privilege in AWS IAM with Access Analyzer and Last Access Data
item.description: A practical guide on enforcing least privilege in AWS IAM by using IAM Access Analyzer and service Last Accessed data. Includes real workflows, auditing strategies, and automation tips.

item.title: Securing EC2 Access with AWS Systems Manager Session Manager: Eliminating SSH
item.description: A comprehensive guide to replacing SSH access with AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for EC2 instances, enhancing security and compliance.

item.title: Securing Temporary Credentials in AWS: Best Practices for Safe Role Usage
item.description: Learn how to secure temporary AWS credentials using IAM roles, STS, and automation. Prevent misuse and follow least privilege best practices.

item.title: Building Least-Privilege IAM Roles with IAM Access Analyzer
item.description: Learn how to use IAM Access Analyzer to identify risky permissions, generate fine-tuned IAM policies, and integrate the tool into your AWS development workflow.
